name: Hyperbolic Sine Function
description: Odd function defined by (e^x - e^{-x})/2. Grows exponentially as x approaches ±∞.

name: Hyperbolic Cosine Function
description: Even function defined by (e^x + e^{-x})/2. Always at least 1, with a minimum at x = 0.

name: Hyperbolic Tangent Function
description: Odd function with horizontal asymptotes at y = ±1. The ratio sinh(x)/cosh(x).

name: Hyperbolic Cotangent Function
description: Reciprocal of tanh(x) with a vertical asymptote at x = 0 and horizontal asymptotes at y = ±1.

name: Hyperbolic Secant Function
description: Reciprocal of cosh(x), always positive with maximum value 1 at x = 0.

name: Hyperbolic Cosecant Function
description: Reciprocal of sinh(x) with a vertical asymptote at x = 0 and exponential decay toward zero.
